scripts.test: (cd packages/mojidata && yarn test) && (cd packages/mojidata-api && yarn test) && (cd packages/react-mojidata-api && yarn test:unit) && (cd packages/idstool && yarn test) && (cd packages/mojidata-cli && yarn test)
scripts.build: (cd packages/mojidata && yarn prepare) && (cd packages/idsdb-utils && yarn prepare) && (cd packages/idsdb && yarn prepare) && (cd packages/mojidata-api && yarn prepare) && (cd packages/react-mojidata-api && yarn prepare) && (cd packages/idstool && yarn prepare) && (cd packages/mojidata-cli && yarn prepare) && (cd packages/mojidata-api-core && yarn prepare) && (cd packages/mojidata-api-sqljs && yarn prepare) && (cd packages/mojidata-api-hono && yarn prepare) && (cd packages/mojidata-api-runtime && yarn prepare)
